since_last: 66% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +6.50%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC -2.74% · Gold +0.19% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 66% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +6.50%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +6.50%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +32.22%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +32.22%, AVAV +19.38%, CEVA +11.55%, VRT +9.67%, KLAC +9.41%. Laggards: DLR -5.55%, PINS -4.16%, EQIX -3.94%, TTD -3.22%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.23% at $172.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.23% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
